sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى مُقَابَلَةِ عَمَلٍ فِي شَرِكَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ أَمْسِ.
sentences.translation: Juče sam išao na razgovor za posao u jednu veliku kompaniju.
sentences.translationEn: I went to a job interview at a large company yesterday.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَنِي الْمُدِيرُ عَنْ خِبْرَتِي السَّابِقَةِ وَمَهَارَاتِي.
sentences.translation: Menadžer me je pitao o mom prethodnom iskustvu i vještinama.
sentences.translationEn: The manager asked me about my previous experience and skills.

sentences.arabic: أَجَبْتُ عَنْ كُلِّ الْأَسْئِلَةِ بِثِقَةٍ وَابْتِسَامَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Odgovorio sam na sva pitanja sa samopouzdanjem i osmijehom.
sentences.translationEn: I answered all the questions with confidence and a smile.
